title: My First Drum Kit for Young Musicians, 3-Piece Set with Cymbal and Drumsticks, Ages 3+
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: COMPLETE SET: Three-piece drum kit featuring a main drum, two companion drums, overhead cymbal, drumsticks and sturdy stand - perfect for introducing children to rhythm
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for young musicians ages 3 and up, offering a safe and engaging introduction to percussion instruments
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Helps develop hand-eye coordination, rhythm awareness, and musical creativity while providing hours of entertainment
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Drums feature chrome-style rims and black finish, with adjustable height stand for comfortable playing position
COMPACT DESIGN: Perfect size for young players, with space-saving layout that makes it ideal for home use whilst maintaining authentic drum kit feel
description: Product Description Introduce your little one to the exciting world of music with this Jazz Drum 'My First Drum Kit'. Perfect for aspiring young musicians aged 3 and up, this compact drum set features three well-crafted drums mounted on a sturdy stand, complete with a mounted cymbal and drumsticks. The kit includes two smaller drums and one larger central drum, all featuring sleek black shells with chrome-style rims for a professional look. The drums are sized appropriately for children, making them easy to play while maintaining authentic drum sounds. The included cymbal adds variety to the musical experience, allowing young drummers to explore different percussion sounds. The stable stand keeps all pieces properly positioned at an ideal height for young players. This drum kit serves as an excellent introduction to rhythm and coordination, helping develop musical skills while providing hours of entertainment. Whether for practice or play, this drum set offers a genuine musical experience that will inspire creativity and nurture a love for music in young children. Directions 1. Remove the drum kit from its packaging. 2. Assemble the drum stand according to the included instructions. 3. Attach the main drum, two companion drums, and the overhead cymbal to the stand. 4. Position the drums and cymbal at an appropriate height for the child. 5. Place the drumsticks in a convenient location for the child to access. 6. Allow the child to explore and play the drum kit. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Choking hazrad - Small Parts See more
